name_en: 💦Chane1🧩24p hoho Shoulder Bag A. Collects all elements of 19bag, emitting a low-key luxury vibe~ It can easily handle any style of outfit. The combination of chain and leather cleverly balances toughness and softness, showcasing a girl's unique charm. Very suitable for spring and summer. The real item looks better than the picture. The large diamond quilt is more fashionable. Size: 13×20×4.5cm
